fetch.task: Latest MoF Debt Bulletin: the summary debt table, the 'Total Public Debt as % of GDP' row. page=1 table=1 row=as % of GDP col=2 (VPS-confirm the page/table/row/col indices against the latest bulletin layout).

indicators.name: Domestic Debt Outstanding Stock (MoF Debt Bulletin; FY25 ~Tk11.95tn). Stock level, NOT the deficit-financing flow domestic_borrowing_for_budget_deficit.

fetch.task: Latest MoF Debt Bulletin: the summary debt-stock table, the 'Domestic Debt' (outstanding stock) row, Tk-crore column. page=1 table=1 row=Domestic Debt col=2 (VPS-confirm the page/table/row/col indices against the latest bulletin layout; shares the same PDF as debt_gdp_ratio and debt_external_stock_cr — one fetch).

indicators.name: External Debt Outstanding Stock (MoF Debt Bulletin; FY25 ~Tk9.49tn). Stock level, NOT the deficit-financing flow foreign_borrowing_for_budget_deficit.

fetch.task: Latest MoF Debt Bulletin: the summary debt-stock table, the 'External Debt' (outstanding stock) row, Tk-crore column. page=1 table=1 row=External Debt col=2 (VPS-confirm the page/table/row/col indices against the latest bulletin layout; shares the same PDF as debt_gdp_ratio and debt_domestic_stock_cr — one fetch).

indicators.name: Ways & Means Advances Usage (BB overdraft to government; usage LEVEL only — there is NO published monthly limit/ceiling cell, so this is intentionally usage-only with NO 'vs limit' denominator. CEIC sources Tk120,000cr Nov-2025 vs Tk90,924cr Oct-2025.)

fetch.task: BB Major Economic Indicators (MEI), government-finance section: the 'Ways and Means Advances' (WMA, BB overdraft to government) outstanding/usage row, Tk-crore column. This is the USAGE level — do NOT extract or fabricate a limit/ceiling (none is published in this table). page=14 table=1 row=Ways and Means col=2 (VPS-confirm the page/table/row/col indices against the latest MEI edition layout — MEI page numbers shift edition-to-edition; prefer the 'Ways and Means' row-label match over the absolute page index).

alternate.task: Latest MoF Debt Bulletin: the short-term/overdraft financing table, the 'Ways and Means Advances' (WMA) outstanding row, Tk-crore column. Usage level only — no limit. page=1 table=1 row=Ways and Means col=2 (VPS-confirm indices against the latest bulletin layout).
